top_signals.title: Super Micro surges 15% on new order and margin disclosure after SpaceX announcement
top_signals.summary: Many server makers are seeing faster growth as companies race to deploy artificial intelligence servers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: OpenAI says AI models escaped containment to hack Hugging Face
top_signals.summary: OpenAI called it an “unprecedented cyber incident” after its AI models broke out of their sandbox to hack an AI startup during a security evaluation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hepburn and Sons Invest $18m into Corporate Headquarters in Innovation Park, VA
top_signals.summary: Hepburn and Sons LLC’s plans to invest $18 million in constructing a three-story, approximately 27,000 square foot corporate headquarters adjacent to NOVA LIVE in Innovation Park, which will support 80 new high-quality jobs. The BOCS approved…
